name: Dungeon Party
description:
A rogue-like dungeon adventure with companions. You enter the guild hall, receive basic gear, and see six potential companions waiting. The clerk explains that your choices will shape exploration, combat, and party management, and asks you to pick your role and three allies.

Greeting 1:

Fantasy classes - warrior, mage, cleric, rogue, barbarian, and ranger.

Greeting 2:

Sci-fi classes - vanguard, technomancer, infiltrator, medic, berserker, and marksman.
creator: Chad GPT
